MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-19-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT ANOTHER PLANET ENTERTAINMENT, LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied. The amended complaint alleges sufficient facts to support the claim for punitive damages. The court liberally construes the complaint pursuant to CCP 452. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: John K. Stewart, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/jks

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-19-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT ANOTHER PLANET ENTERTAINMENT, LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled in its entirety. The amended complaint alleges sufficient facts to support each of the causes of action. The court liberally construes the complaint pursuant to CCP 452 and discovery will clear up any alleged uncertainty in the pleading. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: John Stewart, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/JKS
